text: So, like, when can I get my order? Because I saw something on the site about delays but... my friend said theirs came already. Is that normal?
I thought the meeting was scheduled for tomorrow, but I saw a message saying it’s today. Can you confirm?

I was really looking forward to my purchase, but I received the wrong item. It's so disappointing, especially since I needed it for a special occasion. Can you please help me get a refund for the mistake? I just don't understand how this happened.

I ordered this fancy gadget but it showed up with a weird crack and I'm just really disappointed because I had to wait a week for it. Do you guys even check the quality before shipping? Totally ruins my plans!
I received the wrong item in my order. Please process a refund.

I was really hopeful about this product, but it just didn’t work out for me. I was expecting it to be great, but honestly, I'm feeling pretty frustrated. Can I get a full refund? It's disappointing to have to ask, but I can’t use it at all. I’ve read that others had similar issues, so I’m not sure what to think.
I received the wrong item but I also don’t think I should pay for return shipping. Could you sort this out for me?
I was charged for two items, but I only ordered one. Can you process a refund for the extra charge?

So, my app keeps crashing when I try to open it, but I can see it just fine on my friend's phone? It's like, why is it acting up on mine? Super frustrating! Not sure if it's my phone or something else, but I really need it to work. Can you help?
I'm not sure why I can't find the info I need about my subscription. Is it true that changes were made recently? I feel lost and don't want to miss out on any benefits.
I've been trying to find some clarity regarding the new subscription options, and I just feel a bit overwhelmed by all the details. Could you help me understand the key differences?
I can't log in. My password is lost somewhere, and I think I used a different email? Not sure what to do now.

As a long-time user, I'm really frustrated. I was promised a certain feature that I’m still unable to access, and when I reached out, I was told that it’s unavailable. This feels like a contradiction to what was advertised, and I'm quite upset about it.
I have noticed that my email address linked to my account is incorrect, and it seems I am unable to update it myself. Could you please guide me on how to resolve this issue?
I'm really frustrated because my app keeps crashing whenever I try to open it. I don’t know why this is happening, and it’s making my day so much harder.
I received my order late, but the item was perfect. I still can't shake the frustration of the delay, though.
